title.en: As time passed, Ye Tian killed more and more Da...

content.en:
After killing this Dao Strange Object, Ye Tian continued to look for other Dao Strange Things.

These Dao strange things have no wisdom, everything follows instinctive action, and they will not unite, otherwise Ye Tian will be in trouble.

It didn't take long for him to find the second Dao Artifact and kill it with a little effort.

As time passed, Ye Tian killed more and more Dao strange things.

But occasionally there are mistakes, for example, some of the Dao Strange Objects are really too powerful, even if there is a suppression of the Blood Pattern Tablet to weaken the opponent's strength, but it can still exert the strength between the sixth-fold Dao realm and the seventh-fold Dao realm, which is even more powerful than Ye Tian's true body copy body.

For this kind of Dao strange thing, Ye Tian couldn't kill it, so he could only give up.

Fortunately, there are also a lot of weaker Supreme Dao Strange Things here, so he can kill one every once in a while.

Gradually, he collected more and more items from the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rules.

After a long time, Ye Tian had already collected more than a hundred fragments of the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items.

"It's time to go, there are so many strange things in the Fourth Strange Land Blood River Strange Land, I have killed a lot, and the rest are those that I can't kill at the moment. "

Ye Tian was ready to leave.

Swish!

Ye Tian came out of the Blood River and left here as soon as possible, and also notified the Taisu Palace Master.

If the Sevenfold Dao Realm of the Infinite Heavenly Palace attacked him, the Taisu Palace Master would respond to him in time.

Soon.

Ye Tian met with the Taisu Palace Master.

"Ye Tian, have you collected thirty items of the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rules?"

The Taisu Palace Lord asked with some expectation.

"Collected!"

Ye Tian waved his hand, and thirty seventh-sequence Supreme Dao Rule items appeared, all of which were fragments from the body of the Supreme Dao Strange Things.

The Taisu Palace Lord looked at these Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items and revealed excitement.

These fragments of the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Items may be able to cultivate more than two Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms.

The Taisu Palace Lord put away the thirty items of the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and then left.

And Ye Tian's copy body was ready to sneak into the third strange place again, after all, the third strange place also contained the seventh sequence of supreme dao rules.

Other than that.

He was also going to use those Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items in his hand to comprehend the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule.

His seventh sequence to the realm of Dao rules was too low, it belonged to the level that he had just comprehended, and it was at most a point realm.

He also wants to comprehend the seventh sequence of supreme rules to the realm of ten percent, so as to comprehend the sixth sequence of supreme dao rules!

Therefore, he needed a large number of Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items.

......

Taisu Palace.

The Longqin Palace Lord came to the Taisu Palace Master.

"I've seen the Lord of the Taisu Palace!"

The Longqin Palace Lord said respectfully.

"Long Qin, do you want to comprehend the rules of the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao?" asked the Taisu Palace Master.

"Yes!" said the Longqin Palace Master without thinking.

Who doesn't want to comprehend the rules of the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao? Once he comprehends it, he will be able to impact the Seventh Supreme Dao realm!

Wow!

Pieces of the seventh sequence of Dao rule items fell in front of the Longqin Palace Master.

"These are ten items of the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao rules, enough for you to comprehend the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao rules, if there is anything left, return it. "Taisu Palace Master said.

"Seventh Sequence of Solstice Rule Items!!"

The Longqin Palace Lord was shocked.

This kind of treasure can't be bought at all, it's too rare, and you have to kill the supreme dao strange thing that contains the rules of the seventh sequence of the supreme path before you can get it!

As a result, the Taisu Palace Master took out ten pieces at once, how could she not be shocked!

"Taisu Palace Master, I promise to comprehend the rules of the seventh sequence of supreme paths!"

The Longqin Palace Lord assured.

"Go ahead!"

The Taisu Palace Lord waved his hand.

Swish!

The master of the Longqin Palace left for retreat.

And soon, another Sixfold Peak Dao Realm came over.

Next, the Taisu Palace Master gave out thirty items of the seventh sequence to the Dao rules, and the three sixfold Dao realms she gave were all in the bottleneck stage, and the eighth sequence of the Dao rules had all reached the ten-percent realm.

It can be said that they all have hope for a breakthrough.

Once there are two successful breakthroughs, the strength of Taisu Palace will skyrocket, and the war will be tilted in favor of Taisu Palace.

If they all broke through and hadn't used up the seventh sequence of Sevenfold Dao Rule items, maybe they could cultivate another Sevenfold Dao Realm, even better.

"And Ye Tian, if he can break through to the Fourfold Dao Realm, his strength is also enough to match the Sevenfold Dao Realm! Moreover, he is estimated to be able to obtain a lot of Seventh Sequence Dao Rule Items this time, and the Seventh Sequence to the Dao Rule Realm will inevitably be greatly improved!" muttered the Taisu Palace Master.

The years passed.

One solstice year after another has passed.

100,000 to the year of the Tao!

Millions to the year!

An era of solstice!

Gradually, dozens of solstice eras passed.

At this time.

Both the Taisu Palace and the Wuji Heavenly Palace have suffered heavy losses, and I don't know how many of the fallen Dao Realms have fallen.

It can be said that the strength of the entire Infinite Domain has decreased significantly.

But to this extent, there is no way out.

this day.

Taisu Palace.

The place where the master of Longqin Palace retreats.

At this time, the aura of the seventh sequence of supreme rules gradually permeated her body.

Rumble!!!!!

The Longqin Palace Lord opened his eyes, revealing a look of excitement.

"I have finally comprehended the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and there are still four Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items left!" said the Longqin Palace Lord.

She immediately went out of the customs and gave the remaining four pieces of the seventh sequence to the Dao rule item to the Taisu Palace Master, and then continued the retreat to impact the sevenfold Dao realm.

It didn't take long.

Click!

The bottleneck of the Sevenfold Dao Realm was torn apart, and the energy that she frantically devoured the origin of heaven and earth stepped into the Sevenfold Dao Realm level.

And just when the Longqin Palace Lord broke through, the Taisu Palace Lord and the others looked at the Sevenfold Dao Realm one after another.

"Long Qin has broken through to the Sevenfold Dao Realm, and now our strength has risen dramatically, completely surpassing the Infinite Heavenly Palace!" said the Taisu Palace Lord excitedly.

She wanted to end the war too much, and the breakthrough of the Longqin Palace Lord was too timely.

Meanwhile.

Infinite Heavenly Palace.

The Six Crying Heavenly Venerables found through the Taixu Tianxun Mirror that there was another sevenfold Dao realm aura in the direction of the Taisu Palace.

"It's not good, Taisu Palace estimates that a new sevenfold supreme Dao realm has been born!"

The faces of the six Heavenly Venerables were ugly.

And that's just the beginning.

After another period of time, Taisu Palace once again gave birth to a Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm, which made the other Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms of Wuji Heavenly Palace panic and wanted to escape.

Another period of time passed.

Taisu Heavenly Palace once again gave birth to a sevenfold supreme Dao realm.

In a short period of time, the connection broke through the three-fold sevenfold Dao realm, which in itself was abnormal.

But Wuji Heavenly Palace didn't know the reason at all, only knew that he was in trouble.
